ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tissue_samples" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "tissue" TEXT /* Type of tissue the sample was collected from */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the plant from which the sample was derived */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment applied to the sample (if any) */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* Replicate number for the sample */,
  "merge_id" TEXT /* Identifier for merging related samples */,
  "paired" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sample is paired with another sample */,
  "spots" INTEGER /* Number of detected spots in the analysis */,
  "avg_length" INTEGER /* Average length of sequences in the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "collector_id" TEXT /* ID of the person who collected the sample */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the quality of the sample */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track dataset updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_versions" (
  "version_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Foreign key linking to the `tissue_samples` table */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_pairs" (
  "pair_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each pair */,
  "sample_id1" TEXT /* Foreign key linking to the first sample in the pair */,
  "sample_id2" TEXT /* Foreign key linking to the second sample in the pair */,
  "pair_type" TEXT /* Type of pairing (e.g., control vs. treatment) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)
